summary: Tightened the chapter seam by linking the Christmas-kitchens opening more explicitly to Chapter 7's undercroft and hospital-wing aftermath, then sharpened Owen's closing retreat into a smaller, trackable sensation so the later handoff back into his notebook-minded mode lands more cleanly.
edits: Added a direct callback in the opening paragraph to the hospital-wing shout after the East Undercroft.
Adjusted the final sentence so Owen's withdrawal ends on a smaller, countable rhythm rather than a neutral pause.
